verdict_history.notes: Full 3-lane composite on live http://localhost:3000/catalis. Visual Oracle flagged 3 blockers (hero whitespace gutter, empty mid-page band, flat blue CTA placeholder) and 1 major (AI-slop equal-column card grid). Code Lane flagged 4 whileHover.boxShadow motion-prop errors across benefits/core-features/features/pricing. Mechanical 65/76. Phase 0 backfill was source-only — REJECT is calibrated truth not regression.

verdict_history.phase: Phase 6 step B — Code fix loop
verdict_history.notes: 4 whileHover.boxShadow → CSS hover:shadow-* transition-shadow (motion keeps only y-offset). Code Lane: 79 → 99 (+20). Visual/Mechanical not re-run in this pass (would require dev server restart + new Visual Oracle sub-agent). Only remaining Code Lane warning: no-h-screen on hero.tsx:70 (intentional full-viewport hero, stylistic).
